nasb.text: Now it came about after these things, that it was told Abraham, saying, “Behold, Milcah also has borne children to your brother Nahor:

esv.text: Now after these things it was told to Abraham, “Behold, Milcah also has borne children to your brother Nahor:

cnv.text: 這些事以後，有人告訴亞伯拉罕說：“密迦也給你的兄弟拿鶴生了幾個兒子；

ccb.text: 后来，有人告诉亚伯拉罕：“密迦为你的兄弟拿鹤生了几个儿子，

csbs.text: 这些事以后，有人告诉亚伯拉罕说：“看哪，美尔迦为你兄弟拿鹤生了儿子：
